use_cases: Navigation menus with animated visual feedback on hover or click
Category filtering interfaces with smooth background transitions
Tabbed content sections with spring-animated selection states
Interactive navigation bars for web applications and dashboards
ai_summary: A reusable animated tabs component that displays interactive navigation items with a smooth background highlight effect. Uses Framer Motion for spring-based animations when hovering or clicking tabs, updating a shared layoutId to create fluid background transitions. Supports both hoverable and click-based activation modes with CSS variable-driven theming.
